competitions.product: WIN A NEO-VINTAGE ROLEX GMT-MASTER II "PEPSI" 16710 W/ BOX & BOOKLETS
competitions.product_info: Home – Rolex GMT-Master II “Pepsi” 16710 WIN A NEO-VINTAGE ROLEX GMT-MASTER II "PEPSI" 16710 W/ BOX & BOOKLETS Value: £9,500 Duration: 7 Days Age: Circa 2000 Max. Entries: 949 Ticket Price: £20 Live Draw: 05/05/26 The Rolex GMT-Master is one of the most iconic watches ever made, instantly recognisable with its blue & red “Pepsi” bezel. It was recently discontinued by Rolex , making vintage and neo-vintage examples like this more desirable than ever. This reference, the 16710 is one of its best iterations, perfectly balancing vintage styling with modern practicality . This example dates to 2000 and is in immaculate condition , with its box and booklets set. 45.10% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 428 949 45.1% 521 Tickets remaining 521/949 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 2 Days 20 Hours 3 Minutes 52 Seconds ENTER NOW WIN A NEO-VINTAGE ROLEX GMT-MASTER II "PEPSI" ENTER NOW 45.10% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 428 949 45.1% 521 Tickets remaining 521/949 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 2 Days 20 Hours 3 Minutes 52 Seconds Value: £9,500 Duration: 7 days Age: Circa 2000 Entries: 949 Max. Ticket Price: £20 Live Draw: 05/05/2026 The Rolex GMT-Master is one of the most iconic watches ever made, instantly recognisable with its blue & red “Pepsi” bezel. It was recently discontinued by Rolex , making vintage and neo-vintage examples like this more desirable than ever. This reference, the 16710 is one of its best iterations, perfectly balancing vintage styling with modern practicality . This example dates to 2000 and is in immaculate condition , with its box and booklets set. #23 - The Rolex GMT-Master II "Pepsi" 16710 w/ Box & Booklets Circa 2000 The History— The Example The Rolex GMT-Master is one of the most iconic watches ever made, originally developed in the 1950s for airline pilots to track multiple time zones during long-haul flights. Its blue and red “Pepsi” bezel quickly became synonymous with international travel, offering a clear day/night distinction at a glance. The reference 16710 GMT-Master II is widely regarded as one of the best executions of the model, perfectly balancing vintage proportions with modern practicality. Powered by the Rolex calibre 3185 , it features an independently adjustable hour hand, allowing the wearer to track a second time zone with ease while maintaining accurate home time – a genuinely useful function for travel. This example dates to 2000 is presented in immaculate condition , with excellent case definition and an immaculate cosmetic appearance. It is accompanied by its box and booklets , completing a strong and highly wearable example. One of the true modern classic wristwatches – functional, iconic and increasingly collectible. ENTER NOW The First Competition of its Kind The Vintage Watch Draw is unique. We’re the first competition website dedicated to collector-grade vintage watches, backed by a trusted expert. After the initial idea over five years ago, we’re so excited to now bring this new concept to you. Curated by A Trusted Expert Our competitions are curated by Alex Stevens, a trusted & reputable vintage watch specialist with lifelong experience in the trade. 12 Month Service Warranty Every watch is fully serviced by our watchmaker & comes with a 12 month mechanical warranty, so you can enjoy your watch hassle-free. Collector-Grade Condition Every watch is meticulously curated by Alex, known for selecting only the finest, collector-grade examples in terms of condition & originality. Low & Transparent Odds We don’t flood the draw with tickets. Our competitions are deliberately limited to keep odds low & your chance of winning fair. Authenticity Guarantee Every watch is thoroughly inspected & fully authenticated by our in-house expert. We are professionals, not enthusiasts or hobbyists. Guaranteed Draws Every draw ends on the stated date, no matter what. We never extend our competitions, even if we haven't sold all the tickets. competitions.product_info: Home – Rolex GMT-Master II “Pepsi” 16710 WIN A NEO-VINTAGE ROLEX GMT-MASTER II "PEPSI" 16710 W/ BOX & BOOKLETS Value: £9,500 Duration: 7 Days Age: Circa 2000 Max. It was recently discontinued by Rolex , making vintage and neo-vintage examples like this more desirable than ever. This example dates to 2000 and is in immaculate condition , with its box and booklets set. 45.10% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 428 949 45.1% 521 Tickets remaining 521/949 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 2 Days 20 Hours 3 Minutes 52 Seconds ENTER NOW WIN A NEO-VINTAGE ROLEX GMT-MASTER II "PEPSI" ENTER NOW 45.10% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 428 949 45.1% 521 Tickets remaining 521/949 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 2 Days 20 Hours 3 Minutes 52 Seconds Value: £9,500 Duration: 7 days Age: Circa 2000 Entries: 949 Max. Ticket Price: £20 Live Draw: 05/05/2026 The Rolex GMT-Master is one of the most iconic watches ever made, instantly recognisable with its blue & red “Pepsi” bezel. It was recently discontinued by Rolex , making vintage and neo-vintage examples like this more desirable than ever. This reference, the 16710 is one of its best iterations, perfectly balancing vintage styling with modern practicality . This example dates to 2000 and is in immaculate condition , with its box and booklets set. #23 - The Rolex GMT-Master II "Pepsi" 16710 w/ Box & Booklets Circa 2000 The History— The Example The Rolex GMT-Master is one of the most iconic watches ever made, originally developed in the 1950s for airline pilots to track multiple time zones during long-haul flights. Its blue and red “Pepsi” bezel quickly became synonymous with international travel, offering a clear day/night distinction at a glance. The reference 16710 GMT-Master II is widely regarded as one of the best executions of the model, perfectly balancing vintage proportions with modern practicality. Powered by the Rolex calibre 3185 , it features an independently adjustable hour hand, allowing the wearer to track a second time zone with ease while maintaining accurate home time – a genuinely useful function for travel. This example dates to 2000 is presented in immaculate condition , with excellent case definition and an immaculate cosmetic appearance. It is accompanied by its box and booklets , completing a strong and highly wearable example. One of the true modern classic wristwatches – functional, iconic and increasingly collectible. ENTER NOW The First Competition of its Kind The Vintage Watch Draw is unique. We’re the first competition website dedicated to collector-grade vintage watches, backed by a trusted expert. After the initial idea over five years ago, we’re so excited to now bring this new concept to you. Curated by A Trusted Expert Our competitions are curated by Alex Stevens, a trusted & reputable vintage watch specialist with lifelong experience in the trade. 12 Month Service Warranty Every watch is fully serviced by our watchmaker & comes with a 12 month mechanical warranty, so you can enjoy your watch hassle-free. Collector-Grade Condition Every watch is meticulously curated by Alex, known for selecting only the finest, collector-grade examples in terms of condition & originality. Low & Transparent Odds We don’t flood the draw with tickets. Our competitions are deliberately limited to keep odds low & your chance of winning fair. Authenticity Guarantee Every watch is thoroughly inspected & fully authenticated by our in-house expert. We are professionals, not enthusiasts or hobbyists. Guaranteed Draws Every draw ends on the stated date, no matter what. We never extend our competitions, even if we haven't sold all the tickets.
